title: Additional View with Excel Functionality
excerpt: It would be great to have an additional View that essentially looks similar to hand has functionality similar to that of Excel or Google Sheets. Due to the Column/Row/Task formatting and functionality, there are certain …

posts.author: kayla061819 (Kayla Pacheco)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be great to have an additional View that essentially looks similar to hand has functionality similar to that of Excel or Google Sheets. Due to the Column/Row/Task formatting and functionality, there are certain project management tasks that are simpler to deviate to excel for the functionality I am looking for, and it would be great to just have an additional view built in for that.

posts.author: Iryna_Belaya (Iryna Belaya)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @kayla061819 ,
If you’re open to the apps on the monday.com marketplace, this is what exactly Smart Spreadsheet addresses. You can automimport your board into a spreadsheet and work with it as if it’s a table in a spreadsheet: apply excel-style calculations and then bind results to the board, build pivot tables with board data, custom graphs, etc. The main benefit that Smart Spreadsheet 2-way syncronized with a board.
